type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: This is the first year this facility surpassed the 20,000 hour employee threshold.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: PM10 and PM2.5 emissions increased by greater than 10% due to an increase in operating hours as this plant operated for a full year in 2015, while it only operated for half of 2014. The additional operating hours resulted in an increase in sweet gas flared volume, which results in the release of PM10 and PM2.5.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
PM10 and PM2.5 emissions increased by greater than 10% due to an increase in operating hours as this plant operated for a full year in 2015, while it only operated for half of 2014. The additional operating hours resulted in an increase in sweet gas flared volume, which results in the release
of PM10 and PM2.5.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
VOC emissions have increased by greater than 10%. As this location surpassed the employee hour threshold in 2015, VOCs related to fugitive emissions and truck loading losses have been added to the CAC inventory. VOCs from truck loading are the main reason for the increase. Further, a
small percentage of the increase in VOC emissions can be attributed to an increase in operating hours as this plant operated for a full year in 2015, while it only operated for half of 2014. The additional operating hours resulted in an increase in flared gas volume, which results in the release of VOCs.
